g.title: build_symtab
g.text: (single source of truth for all binding decisions)

g.title: gen_lib
g.text: pub(crate) mod ffi; pub mod gp; pub mod topo_ds; ... (×79)

g.title: ffi_per_class
g.text: fn method(self: &T) — direct CXX (primitives, const ref)

g.title: correspondence
g.text: 1:1 Correspondence: each ffi.rs wrapper declaration has a matching wrappers.hxx C++ implementation
C++: inline unique_ptr<R> Cls_method(const T&) { make_unique<R>(self.M()) }
C++: inline const Base& Derived_as_Base(const Derived& s) { return s; }
Note: direct CXX methods (self: &T returning primitives/const ref) have NO C++ wrapper — CXX generates the glue

g.title: rx_handle
g.text: Handle impl blocks (upcast methods on Handle types)

g.title: rx_per_class
g.text: by-value return + const char* method delegation
walk ancestor chain, emit non-overridden inherited wrappers
